title: Isla's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Baby Isla plays peek-a-boo with the changing seasons in her backyard, discovering flowers in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in fall, and snow in winter.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Isla? Here she is behind the big oak tree!

illustration.description: A large oak tree with bare branches against a soft spring pastel sky. Baby Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes peeks out from behind the trunk with a big smile. Tiny green buds are beginning to appear on the branches.
illustration.alt: Baby Isla hiding behind an oak tree in early spring

pages.text: Spring comes! Peek-a-boo flowers! Pink and yellow blooms everywhere!

illustration.description: The same oak tree now has fresh green leaves and pink blossoms. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sits beneath it surrounded by yellow daffodils and pink tulips in soft spring pastels. She's reaching toward a flower with wonder.
illustration.alt: Isla discovering spring flowers under the blooming oak tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo butterflies! Summer is here! So bright and warm!

illustration.description: The oak tree is now full and lush with deep green summer leaves. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes claps her hands as colorful butterflies flutter around her in bright summer colors - orange monarchs, yellow swallowtails, and blue morphos dance in the warm sunlight.
illustration.alt: Isla playing with butterflies under the summer oak tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo leaves! Fall colors everywhere! Orange, red, and gold!

illustration.description: The same oak tree now displays beautiful autumn foliage in warm oranges, deep reds, and golden yellows. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sits in a pile of fallen leaves, throwing them up in the air with pure joy.
illustration.alt: Isla playing in autumn leaves under the colorful oak tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo snowflakes! Winter magic! White and sparkly all around!

illustration.description: The oak tree stands bare with snow-covered branches against a cool winter sky in soft blues and whites. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes bundled in a cozy coat reaches up to catch falling snowflakes, her breath visible in the crisp air.
illustration.alt: Isla catching snowflakes under the winter oak tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo Isla! Through all the seasons! Always playing, always growing!

illustration.description: A magical view showing the oak tree split into four sections, each showing a different season - spring buds, summer green, autumn colors, and winter snow. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes stands in the center, arms outstretched, celebrating the cyclical beauty of nature's calendar.
illustration.alt: Isla surrounded by all four seasons of the oak tree

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Isla do behind the tree?
questions.explanation: Isla plays peek-a-boo behind the oak tree throughout all the seasons!

questions.question: What color are the spring flowers?
questions.explanation: The spring flowers are pink and yellow - tulips and daffodils!

questions.question: What falls from the sky in winter?
questions.explanation: Snowflakes fall in winter, creating a magical white world for Isla to play in!
